# 🔥 Welcome to your CopilotForge project!

Your project is pre-configured with CopilotForge. Here's what to do:

1. **Open your AI assistant** (GitHub Copilot Chat, Claude Code, etc.)
2. **Say:** "set up my project"  
3. **Answer a few questions** about what you're building
4. **Watch it create** skills, agents, and recipes for your project!

> 📖 Full guide: [docs/GETTING-STARTED.md](../docs/GETTING-STARTED.md)

## Clean up this repo

After setting up, you can:
- Edit this README.md to describe YOUR project
- Delete `cookbook/` recipes you don't need
- Delete `docs/` if you want a clean start (keep `.github/skills/planner/` — that's the magic!)
- Customize the generated agents and skills in `.copilot/` and `.github/skills/`

## Next Steps

1. **Quick start:** Run the wizard with "set up my project"
2. **Learn more:** Check out [GETTING-STARTED.md](../docs/GETTING-STARTED.md)
3. **Questions?** See the [FAQ](../docs/FAQ.md)

Happy building! 🚀
